claim: TaxBreak reports 847.5 GPU kernel launches per output token for dense Llama-3.2-1B and 9305 for OLMoE-1B/7B on H100 decode sweeps
Memory-Floor CUDA Graphs yields 1.259x speedup on Qwen-2.5-7B decode (BS=1, ctx=2048) on H100 by removing host overhead without reducing HBM traffic
YiRage is a multi-backend LLM inference optimization compiler (CUDA, CPU, MPS, Triton, NKI, MLIR)
